# immich_memory (Resource)

Manages an Immich memory.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "immich_memory" "example" {
  memory_at = "2023-06-01T00:00:00Z"
  is_saved  = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `memory_at` (String) The date the memory represents (ISO 8601).

### Optional

- `is_saved` (Boolean) Whether the memory is saved by the user.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for the memory.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

### OpenTofu Import Block (Recommended)

```terraform
import {
  to = immich_memory.example
  id = "5678-abcd-1234"
}
```

### CLI Import

```terraform
tofu import immich_memory.example 5678-abcd-1234
```
